artifacts.title: HuaSheng Sales Development Plan
artifacts.summary: Sixteen trigger-led accounts, public business contacts, tailored English outreach drafts, and a 90-day go-to-market plan. Chinese review notes included.

artifacts.title: OpenViking, Explained
artifacts.summary: An interactive, source-pinned architecture board for OpenViking — the open-source context database for AI agents — with code-traced Write / Retrieve / Manage pipelines and a bilingual reading path.

artifacts.title: 别问妈妈 · The Mom Test 学习手册
artifacts.summary: 把 The Mom Test 拆成 74 篇可连续阅读、检索和无限展开证据的双语学习短文。

artifacts.title: 让价值变得显而易见 · Obviously Awesome 定位手册
artifacts.summary: 把 April Dunford 的定位方法拆成 53 篇可检索短文、完整来源覆盖图和可填写定位画布。

artifacts.title: 创始人销售作战手册 · Founding Sales
artifacts.summary: 把早期 B2B 销售从创始人验证到团队复制拆成 105 篇短课、完整来源索引和销售容量工作台。

artifacts.title: 真本事 · 从会工作到会赚钱
artifacts.summary: 把个人价值、职业选择、沟通、杠杆与第一次收费重构成 91 篇可读、可查、可实操的中文短课。

artifacts.title: OpenViking: Context Has a Place
artifacts.summary: A source-backed visual field guide to how OpenViking turns resources, memories, and skills into a navigable context system for AI agents.
